name: Ujjwala 2.0
target_description: Adult women (18+) from poor households without an existing LPG connection
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
data_source: PMUY official eligibility criteria from pmuy.gov.in and myscheme.gov.in

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 18 years old
Poor household based on deprivation declaration. BPL ration card or low income as proxy.
rules.ambiguity_note: Poor household determination is based on self-declaration of deprivation — BPL ration card or low income used as proxy indicators

rules.description: Bank account must be seeded with Aadhaar for DBT subsidy transfer
Household must not have any existing LPG connection from any oil marketing company (HP, Indane, Bharat Gas)
rules.ambiguity_note: If your household already has an LPG connection in any family member's name, you cannot get a new Ujjwala connection. Check with your distributor if unsure.

required_documents.document: Ration Card or Family Composition Document (or self-declaration)

benefit_summary: Free LPG connection (cylinder + regulator + hose) + first refill free. Subsidy on subsequent refills via DBT.

application_offices.find_instruction: Your nearest LPG distributor (HP Gas, Indane, or Bharat Gas)

description: Free LPG connection for women from BPL/SC/ST/PM-KISAN/MGNREGA beneficiary households who do not already have a connection. Includes security deposit waiver, free regulator, free first refill, and access to installation. Migrant workers do not need address proof from the place of origin.
description_hindi: BPL, SC/ST, PM-KISAN, MGNREGA लाभार्थी परिवारों की महिलाओं को मुफ़्त LPG गैस कनेक्शन मिलता है। सिक्योरिटी डिपॉजिट माफ, मुफ़्त रेगुलेटर और पहला सिलेंडर मुफ़्त। प्रवासी मजदूरों को अपने मूल गाँव का पता प्रमाण देने की ज़रूरत नहीं। किसी भी HP, Indane, या Bharat Gas वितरक के पास जाएं।
benefit_summary_hindi: मुफ़्त LPG कनेक्शन + पहला सिलेंडर मुफ़्त + सिक्योरिटी डिपॉजिट माफ
